mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.order_no, TO_CHAR(h.order_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS order_date, TO_CHAR(h.delivery_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS delivery_date, h.customer_cd, h.order_type, h.site_cd, h.site_nm, h.site_address, h.total_amount, h.tax_amount, h.tax_separate, h.duo_light, h.remarks, h.order_status, h.is_urgent, bp.bp_nm AS customer_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_order_detail d WHERE d.order_header_id = h.id) AS detail_count FROM sales_order_header h LEFT JOIN business_partner bp ON bp.bp_cd = h.customer_cd ORDER BY h.order_date DESC, h.id DESC

SELECT h.id, h.order_no, TO_CHAR(h.order_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS order_date, TO_CHAR(h.delivery_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS delivery_date, h.customer_cd, h.order_type, h.site_cd, h.site_nm, h.site_address, h.total_amount, h.tax_amount, h.tax_separate, h.duo_light, h.remarks, h.order_status, h.is_urgent, bp.bp_nm AS customer_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_order_detail d WHERE d.order_header_id = h.id) AS detail_count FROM sales_order_header h LEFT JOIN business_partner bp ON bp.bp_cd = h.customer_cd WHERE h.site_nm = #{siteNm} ORDER BY h.order_date DESC, h.id DESC

SELECT h.id, h.order_no, TO_CHAR(h.order_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS order_date, TO_CHAR(h.delivery_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS delivery_date, h.customer_cd, h.order_type, h.site_cd, h.site_nm, h.site_address, h.total_amount, h.tax_amount, h.tax_separate, h.duo_light, h.remarks, h.order_status, h.is_urgent, bp.bp_nm AS customer_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_order_detail d WHERE d.order_header_id = h.id) AS detail_count FROM sales_order_header h LEFT JOIN business_partner bp ON bp.bp_cd = h.customer_cd WHERE h.id = #{id}

SELECT CONCAT(TO_CHAR(now(), 'YY'), '-', LPAD(COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(SPLIT_PART(MAX(order_no), '-', 2) AS INTEGER) + 1 FROM sales_order_header WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT(TO_CHAR(now(), 'YY'), '-%')), 1)::TEXT, 4, '0'))
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sales_order_header ( order_no, order_date, delivery_date, customer_cd, order_type, site_cd, site_nm, site_address, tax_separate, duo_light, remarks, order_status, is_urgent ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, CAST(#{req.orderDate} AS DATE),
CAST(#{req.deliveryDate} AS DATE)
NULL , #{req.customerCd}, #{req.orderType}, #{req.siteCd}, #{req.siteNm}, #{req.siteAddress}, COALESCE(#{req.taxSeparate}, FALSE), #{req.duoLight}, #{req.remarks}, 'PENDING', COALESCE(#{req.isUrgent}, FALSE) )
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order_header SET total_amount = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM sales_order_detail WHERE order_header_id = #{id}), updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
